# gitswitch

> gitswitch is a terminal tool that switches your git identity — name, email, SSH key, GPG signing key, and GitHub account — all at once with one command. It solves what `gh auth switch` doesn't: commit authorship, not just API tokens.

Written in Go, single binary, no runtime dependencies. Runs entirely on the user's machine — no servers, no telemetry.

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/intro): what gitswitch does and why it exists
- [Installation](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/installation): Homebrew and curl install methods
- [Quick start](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/quick-start): first profile, first switch

## Features

- [Commit identity switching](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/commit-identity): changes `user.name` / `user.email` in git config
- [SSH key management](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/ssh-keys): forces a specific key per profile via `core.sshCommand`
- [GPG signing](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/gpg): per-profile signing key for verified commits
- [GitHub account sync](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/github-sync): keeps `gh` CLI auth in lockstep with the active identity
- [Identity awareness](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/identity-awareness): shell hook that recommends the right identity per repo
- [Shell integration](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/features/shell): `gitswitch install` wires up prompt segment, nudge hook, and tab completion

## One-command GitHub setup

`gitswitch login` runs the GitHub device-flow OAuth login and creates a full profile (name, email, GitHub account, token) automatically — no manual `git config` editing.

## CLI reference

- [Commands](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/cli/commands): full command list
- [Profiles](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/cli/profiles): adding, editing, removing profiles
- [Config](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/cli/config): config file location and structure

## Scenarios

- [Freelancer with multiple clients](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/scenarios/freelancer)
- [Open source contributor](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/scenarios/oss)
- [Multiple GitHub accounts](https://gitswitch.dev/docs/scenarios/multi-github)
